## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Risk

- [ ] touches dispatcher / worker-daemon / runtime-state / release gate
- [ ] includes rollback steps
- [ ] includes monitoring / metrics impact

## Doc Sync

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `docs/README.md`
- [ ] `docs/onboarding.md`
- [ ] `docs/API_ENDPOINTS.md`
- [ ] `docs/STATE_MACHINE.md`
- [ ] `docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md`
- [ ] `docs/DOC_SYNC_CHECKLIST.md` reviewed
- [ ] or explicitly `no doc impact`
